narrative:
Renato Veiga is a Portuguese Centre-Back who has established himself as a top performer at the tournament. His overall rating is 7.18/10, placing him in the top 2% of centre-backs at this World Cup. This rating, with a range of 6.83–7.53, reflects a strong and consistent presence in his position.

Evidence from this World Cup highlights Veiga's defensive strengths and limited attacking output. He averages 4.6 clearances and 1.6 interceptions per 90 minutes, showcasing his ability to break up play and relieve pressure. However, his expected assists per 90 minutes at 0.012, along with 0.4 shots per 90, indicate he is not a significant offensive contributor.

Veiga plays a crucial defensive anchor role for Portugal, having accumulated 450 minutes at this World Cup. Scouts should continue to monitor his consistent defensive actions and tactical discipline in their remaining matches. While 76% of his rating comes from club form, his World Cup performances affirm his value as a reliable Centre-Back.
